objective: Convert the vague Monocle Man landing-page ask into a deterministic React benchmark implementation with CI evidence.
implementation_summary: Converted the static benchmark shell to a Vite React SPA.
Implemented the required Monocle Man components, qids, action ids, and a useRegisterAction registry shim.
Implemented modal behavior with focus movement, Escape close, iframe loading only while open, and focus return.
Replaced source-grep/static checks with live-DOM Playwright checks, screenshots, image status, accessibility, and evidence-derived verdict.
Fixed CI-discovered heading, keyboard sequencing, and contrast issues before merge.
stop_condition: One benchmark PR was merged after exact-commit CI and artifact inspection.
